Table Description: Next Numbers by Company/Fiscal Year - Automatic
Elaborated Table Description: An extension of F0002 that controls next number sequences at the company and fiscal year level, enabling unique document numbering per legal entity and accounting period. Supports same-as document type sequencing, auto-reset, and digit embedding (encoding year/period into the generated number).
Elaborated Field Description: The JDE Company code (e.g., '00001') to which this next number sequence belongs. Allows each legal entity or company to maintain its own independent document numbering.

Table Description: Next Numbers by Company/Fiscal Year - Automatic
Elaborated Table Description: An extension of F0002 that controls next number sequences at the company and fiscal year level, enabling unique document numbering per legal entity and accounting period. Supports same-as document type sequencing, auto-reset, and digit embedding (encoding year/period into the generated number).
Elaborated Field Description: A two-character code identifying the document type (e.g., 'RI' for AR Invoice, 'OV' for Sales Order) that this next number sequence controls. Each document type can have its own sequential counter.

Table Description: Next Numbers by Company/Fiscal Year - Automatic
Elaborated Table Description: An extension of F0002 that controls next number sequences at the company and fiscal year level, enabling unique document numbering per legal entity and accounting period. Elaborated Field Description: The century portion of the fiscal year (e.g., '20' for 2000s). Combined with NLFY to identify the exact fiscal year for which this number sequence applies.

Table Description: Next Numbers by Company/Fiscal Year - Automatic

Elaborated Field Description: The two-digit fiscal year (e.g., '24' for 2024) associated with this next number sequence. Allows document numbering to reset or start fresh each fiscal year.

Table Description: Next Numbers by Company/Fiscal Year - Automatic

Elaborated Field Description: Specifies another document type whose next number sequence this record should use. When set, JDE shares the same counter across multiple document types instead of maintaining separate sequences.

Table Description: Unique Key File - Next Available Unique Key
Elaborated Table Description: A simple two-field universal sequence generator table that tracks the next available internal unique key for any given JDE object or table. Used across all JDE modules to generate internal surrogate keys without collision.
Elaborated Field Description: The name of the JDE table or object that requires a unique internal key. Acts as the lookup key to find the correct next-number counter for that specific object.

Table Description: Unique Key File - Next Available Unique Key
Elaborated Table Description: A simple two-field universal sequence generator table that tracks the next available internal unique key for any given JDE object or table. Used across all JDE modules to generate internal surrogate keys without collision.
Elaborated Field Description: The next available unique internal identifier (surrogate key) for the referenced JDE object. JDE reads and increments this value to generate collision-free primary keys across all records.

Elaborated Table Description: The core organizational structure table in JDE EnterpriseOne. Every cost center, department, project, branch, or company subdivision is defined here as a Business Unit. Contains identity fields, address/tax information, 50 category codes for custom classification, project/job dates and cost fields, labor and burden distribution settings, and full audit trail fields. One of the most referenced tables across all JDE modules.
Elaborated Field Description: The unique alphanumeric code identifying a Business Unit (cost center, department, project, branch, etc.) within JDE. This is the primary key used throughout all JDE modules to associate transactions with an organizational unit.

One of the most referenced tables across all JDE modules.
